prompt: 2D digital UI mock-up of a sleek, privacy-focused email client in dark mode. Clean layout with a collapsible sidebar on the left (icons for Unified Inbox, Smart Folders, Calendar, Tasks, Settings), a central message list showing colored priority dots and custom labels, and a reading pane on the right. Top bar features a prominent AI search field and encrypted-mail padlock badge. Minimalist, modern aesthetic with subtle shadows, rounded corners, and clear typography; attachment previews (photo thumbnail and simple bar-chart graphic) displayed in the reading pane for quick context.
prompt_refined: A 2D digital UI mock-up of a sleek, privacy-focused email client in dark mode. The clean layout includes a collapsible sidebar on the left with icons for Unified Inbox, Smart Folders, Calendar, Tasks, and Settings. A central message list displays colored priority dots and custom labels. On the right, a reading pane shows attachment previews, including a photo thumbnail and a simple bar-chart graphic. The top bar features a prominent AI search field and an encrypted-mail padlock badge. The design is minimalist and modern, with subtle shadows, rounded corners, and clear typography.
objects: 2D digital UI mock-up of an email client
Navigation icons (for Unified Inbox, Smart Folders, Calendar, Tasks, Settings)
Central message list with colored priority dots and custom labels
Attachment previews (including photo thumbnail and bar-chart graphic)
